title: Live Main Menu
description: Replaces the vanilla title screen panorama with a live, real-time view of a world.
body: # Live Main Menu An experimental mod that replaces the vanilla title screen panorama with a live, real-time view of a world. Name a singleplayer world "LiveMainMenu" and the mod will load it automatically for the title screen. [Watch an example](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/100fb5af-2af4-42dd-ac29-147c88fb4ae9). If you'd like to support the development of this mod, please consider donating on Ko-fi!
